orig_text:
In accordance with Section 3.7.1 of
[RFC2205], a node receiving a PathErr message takes no action upon
it, and consequently the node must not clear Path or Resv control-
plane or data-plane state.
correct_text:
In accordance with Section 3.1.7 of
[RFC2205], a node receiving a PathErr message takes no action upon
it, and consequently the node must not clear Path or Resv control-
plane or data-plane state.
notes: The document contains an incorrect reference to the "Path Error Messages" chapter of RFC2205
